name: Ratatouille--Version #3
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and garlic. Cook until soft.
3. Add the eggplant and zucchini to the pan. Stir well to combine.
4. Incorporate the pepper strips, salt, and pepper.
5. Sprinkle basil over the vegetables.
6. Cover the pan and simmer until all the vegetables are tender.
7. Add the chopped tomatoes and continue cooking until the mixture is thick and well blended.
8. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
9. Serve hot or chilled, with additional olive oil and lemon juice as desired.
Contributed by Alexus (Fabfood).
